name: raycast-artifact-repository-utility
title: Raycast Artifact Repository Utility
description: Search images and artifacts across private container registries (starting with Harbor).
author: nicoprocessor

commands.name: search-images
commands.title: Search Images
commands.description: Search across all providers by default, or filter by provider

commands.name: search-projects
commands.title: Search Projects
commands.description: Search projects and inspect members for selected provider(s)

commands.name: manage-providers
commands.title: Manage Providers
commands.description: Add and manage registry providers (Private Harbor, Docker Hub)
